macro.title: Pending Home Sales Hit Highest Level in Nearly 4 Years
macro.what: More homebuyers jumped into the market as mortgage rates came down temporarily last week, but it’s still slower than past springs
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The MLS/CLAW updates IDX policy, adds Compass listings
housing.what: The MLS/CLAW revised IDX rules and will add Compass active listings, while allowing premarketed inventory as MLS Exclusives.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Builders discount more but keep prices flat while resale values slip
housing.what: Urban new-construction homes are both scarce and significantly more expensive than existing properties, even as builders lean heavily into suburban development and manage prices to meet weaker demand, according to a Q1 2026 report from Realtor.com and the National Association of Realtors
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.
